auth.solveToProve: Solve this to prove you are human

auth.heroTitle: Manage your grant projects with confidence
auth.heroSubtitle: Track allocations, timesheets, budgets, and reporting — all in one place. Trusted by research organisations across Europe.
auth.nameRequiredDesc: Please enter your first and last name.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.termsRequiredDesc: You must agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.

auth.confirmationResent: A new confirmation email has been sent.
auth.checkEmailForReset: Check your email for a password reset link.
auth.didntReceiveReset: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully.
auth.linkExpiredDesc: This reset link may have expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.
auth.verifyExpired: Unable to verify your email. The link may have expired or already been used. Please try signing in.
auth.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try signing in.
auth.emailConfirmedSuccess: Your email has been confirmed successfully!
auth.noAccessContact: You don't have access to this section. Contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.

auth.mfaSectionDesc: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a code from your authenticator app when signing in.
auth.mfaNotEnrolled: Two-factor authentication is not yet enabled. We recommend enabling it to protect your account.
auth.mfaScanQR: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
auth.mfaScanQRDesc: Use an app like Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password to scan the code below.
auth.mfaManualEntry: Can't scan? Enter this code manually:
auth.mfaEnterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to confirm
auth.mfaEnrolledDesc: Two-factor authentication is now active on your account.
auth.mfaRemovedDesc: Two-factor authentication has been removed from your account.
auth.idleWarningDesc: You will be logged out due to inactivity in {{seconds}} seconds.

onboarding.setupOrgDesc: Set up your organisation — this is your workspace where you'll manage grants, staff, and budgets.
onboarding.addProjectLater: You can always add more projects later from the Projects page.
onboarding.workspaceReady: Your workspace is ready. Start by adding staff members and managing your projects.
onboarding.allDone: All setup steps completed! You can dismiss this card.
onboarding.stepOrgDesc: Configure your organisation name, country, and currency
onboarding.stepStaffDesc: Add the people who work on your projects
onboarding.stepProjectDesc: Set up a grant project with budget and timeline
onboarding.stepTimesheetsDesc: Configure timesheet tracking for your team

callback.pleaseWait: Please wait while we confirm your account
callback.accountVerified: Your account has been verified successfully. You're ready to set up your organisation and start managing your grants.
callback.linkExpired: Unable to verify your email. The link may have expired or already been used. Please try signing in.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.description: Your organisation's share of each project
projects.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to get started.
projects.deleteWPConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
projects.noCollabLinkedDesc: This project is not linked to a collaboration project. Effort data is only available for projects synced from the Collaboration module.
projects.noEffortData: No effort data available yet. Add partners and work packages in the linked collaboration project first.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.noExpensesDesc: Record project expenses to track budget consumption against travel, subcontracting, and other cost categories.
expenses.budgetAlertMessage: {{category}} budget is {{spentPct}}% consumed but only {{timelinePct}}% of the project timeline has passed.
expenses.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Flight to Brussels for consortium meeting

deliverables.title: Deliverables
deliverables.noDeliverablesDesc: Add project deliverables to track outputs and deadlines.
deliverables.noMilestonesDesc: Add project milestones to track key achievements.

reporting.title: Reporting Periods
reporting.noPeriodsDesc: Add reporting periods to track review deadlines.

budgetChart.title: Budget Consumption
budgetChart.noData: No financial budget data yet. Budget data is auto-seeded from the Financial Budgets page.

staff.title: Staff
staff.regionDesc: Used to match regional public holidays to this person
staff.noStaffDesc: Add your first team member to get started.
staff.deletePersonConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
staff.couldNotReachService: Could not reach the invitation service.
staff.vacationDaysDesc: Annual leave entitlement in working days
staff.inviteDesc: Send an invitation email so this person can create an account and access the system.
staff.systemRoleDesc: This determines what they can see and do in the system. You can change it later in Settings > Users.
staff.invitationWillBeSent: An invitation email will be sent to {{email}} after saving.
staff.hasLinkedAccount: This person has a linked GrantLume account.
staff.invitedAsWaiting: Invited as {{role}} — waiting for them to sign up.
staff.noSystemAccess: This person does not have system access.
staff.invalidFileDesc: Please select an image file (JPG, PNG, etc.)

allocations.title: Allocations
allocations.alreadyExistsDesc: This person-project combination is already in the grid.
allocations.freePmPerMonth: Numbers show free PM per month
allocations.noAllocationsDesc: Add staff and projects first, then create assignments here.
allocations.noAllocationRowsDesc: Select a person and project below to start entering person-month allocations.
allocations.timesheetsDriveDesc: PM values are automatically calculated from timesheet entries and are read-only. To change this, go to Settings → Organisation and disable "Timesheets Drive Allocations".
allocations.noProjectsDesc: Create projects first to set PM budgets.
allocations.noAssignmentDataDesc: Create allocations first to see the project assignment matrix.

timesheets.title: Timesheets
timesheets.noEntriesDesc: Start logging your hours for this period.
timesheets.submitConfirm: Submit this timesheet? Once submitted, it cannot be edited until reviewed.
timesheets.noTimesheetDataDesc: No timesheet entries found for this period.
timesheets.draftDesc: Draft — Fill in your hours and submit
timesheets.signingDesc: Signing in progress — Waiting for e-signature
timesheets.submitConfirmSign: Submit your timesheet for {{period}}? You won't be able to edit hours after submission.
timesheets.recallConfirm: Recall this timesheet to Draft? This will cancel the current submission.
timesheets.timesheetRecalled: Timesheet reverted to Draft. You can edit hours again.
timesheets.noTravelsDesc: No travel entries found for this period. Add travel days using the form above.
timesheets.notApproverDesc: You are not configured as a timesheet approver. Contact your admin to set up approver permissions in Settings.
timesheets.timeRangeHint: Enter daily start/end time & activity description (Tätigkeitsbeschreibung)
timesheets.requiresTimeRangeDesc: When enabled, timesheets for this funding scheme require daily start/end times and an activity description instead of simple hour entry. Required by some national funding bodies (e.g. BMBF in Germany).
timesheets.dualSignFlow: Employee signs first, then approver signs second

absences.title: Absences
absences.noAbsencesDesc: Record absences to track team availability.
absences.substituteOverlap: This person has an approved or pending absence overlapping these dates.
absences.couldNotCheckOverlaps: Could not check for overlapping absences.
absences.noColleaguesAbsent: No colleagues absent in this period.
absences.colleaguesAbsent: {{count}} colleague(s) also absent during this period

financials.title: Financials
financials.noFinancialDataDesc: Add projects and budget entries to see the budget vs actuals overview.
financials.budgetRowsUpToDate: All budget rows already exist and are in sync with project data.
financials.personnelUpToDate: Personnel actuals already match allocation data.
financials.personnelSynced: {{count}} personnel actual(s) updated from allocation data.
financials.expensesUpToDate: Non-personnel actuals already match expense records.
financials.expensesSynced: {{count}} budget actual(s) updated from expense records.

proposals.title: Proposals
proposals.description: Track grant proposal applications and convert granted ones into projects
proposals.deleteProposalConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
proposals.convertToProjectConfirm: This will create a new project from "{{name}}" with the proposal's budget data. You can then edit the project details. Continue?
proposals.noProposalsDesc: Track your grant proposals from submission to decision.
proposals.enterDetails: Enter the details of your grant proposal application.
proposals.searchEuCalls: Search EU calls or type custom identifier...
proposals.searchEuCallsHint: Start typing to search open EU Funding & Tenders calls, or enter any identifier
proposals.selectFundingScheme: Select or type a funding scheme...
proposals.noMatchingSchemes: No matching schemes — type to enter custom

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred interface language. This setting is saved to your profile.
settings.rolePermDesc: Configure what each role can see and do. Administrators always have full access. External Participants can only access projects they are invited to and are not configurable here.
settings.whichSections: Which sections appear in the sidebar
settings.whatRoleCanDo: What this role can create, edit, or manage
settings.adminNote: Administrator role always has full access to all modules and data. Changes below apply to {{role}} users only.
settings.resetConfirm:
Reset "{{role}}" permissions to defaults?

This will discard any customizations for this role.
settings.permissionsSaved: Role permissions have been updated. Users will see changes on next login.
settings.defaultVacationDaysDesc: Default annual vacation days for new staff members. Individual staff can override this value.
settings.timesheetsDriveAllocationsDesc: When enabled, allocation PM values are automatically calculated from timesheet entries and become read-only. When disabled, allocations can be edited manually.
settings.aiEnabledDesc: Enable AI-powered features such as grant agreement parsing, document import, and AI-assisted data extraction. Disable this if your organisation has data privacy or sovereignty concerns that prevent sharing documents with external AI services.
settings.aiDisabledWarning: AI features are disabled. Grant agreement import, AI document extraction, and AI-assisted import will be hidden across the application.
settings.invitationSentTo: An invitation email has been sent to {{email}}.
settings.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the organisation?
settings.noSchemesDesc: Add funding schemes to categorise your projects (e.g. Horizon Europe, ERC, national).
settings.deleteSchemeConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Projects using this scheme will keep their current settings.
settings.holidaysDesc: Define public/national holidays for your organisation. These dates will be excluded from timesheet entry.
settings.importHolidaysNote: Fetches public holidays from Nager.Date (free API). Existing holidays on the same dates will be updated.
settings.noHolidaysFoundDesc: No national holidays found for {{country}} in {{year}}.
settings.importRegionNote: Will import nationwide holidays plus regional holidays for {{region}}.
settings.noHolidaysDesc2: Add national holidays above — they'll be excluded from timesheet working days.
settings.absenceApproversDesc: Designate staff members who can approve or reject absence requests. When an employee requests time off, all approvers will be notified via in-app notification and email.
settings.approvalStep1: When a staff member's absence is recorded, approvers are notified
settings.approvalStep2: Approvers can approve or reject requests from the Absences page
settings.approvalStep3: The requester receives a notification and email with the decision
settings.approvalStep4: If no approvers are set, absences are auto-approved
settings.noApproversDesc: All absences will be auto-approved until you assign at least one approver.
settings.absenceTypePrivacyDesc: Configure which absence types are shown as private in the conflict visibility panel. Private types will appear as 'Absence' instead of the specific type when other colleagues check for overlapping absences.
settings.absencePrivacyExplanation: When a colleague checks for leave conflicts before submitting their own absence, private absence types will show the person as 'Absent' without revealing the specific reason (e.g. sick leave or parental leave).
settings.departmentsHint: Press Enter or comma to add a department
settings.timesheetApproversDesc: Designate staff members who can approve or reject submitted timesheets. When a timesheet is submitted, all approvers will be notified via in-app notification and email.
settings.tsApprovalStep1: When a staff member submits a timesheet, all timesheet approvers are notified
settings.tsApprovalStep2: Approvers can approve or reject timesheets from the Timesheets page
settings.tsApprovalStep3: If no timesheet approvers are set, only Administrators can approve timesheets
settings.noTimesheetApproversDesc: Only Administrators will be able to approve timesheets until you assign at least one approver.
settings.approvalDeptNote: You can scope approvers to specific departments. Org-wide approvers cover all staff.
settings.tsApprovalDeptNote: You can scope approvers to specific departments. Org-wide approvers cover all staff.
settings.securityDesc: Configure organisation-wide security policies. These settings apply to all members.
settings.requireMfaDesc: All members must enable 2FA before accessing the platform. Users without 2FA will be prompted to set it up.

profile.title: My Settings
profile.description: Manage your personal profile, password, and email notification preferences
profile.managePreferences: Manage which email notifications you receive.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.dbMigrationNote: Email notification preferences require a database migration. Run supabase/add_user_preferences.sql in your Supabase SQL Editor to enable saving preferences. Until then, all notifications are enabled by default.
profile.prefsNotAvailable: Preferences table not yet available. Run the SQL migration first.
profile.couldNotSave: Could not save — preferences table may not be set up yet.
profile.couldNotSavePref: Could not save preference — table may not be set up yet.

help.cantFindAnswer: Can't find what you're looking for?
help.contactFormDesc: Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. Or email us directly at
help.subjectPlaceholder: Briefly describe your question or issue
help.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about what you need help with...
help.messageSentDesc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
help.messageSendFailed: Failed to send your message. Please try again or email us directly.

ai.quotaExhausted: Monthly AI limit reached. Upgrade your plan for more.
ai.quotaWarning: {{remaining}} tokens remaining this month — use wisely.
ai.quotaOk: {{remaining}} tokens and {{requests}} requests remaining this month.
ai.quotaExceededDesc: You've used all your AI credits for this month. Upgrade your plan or wait until next month.
ai.monthlyReset: Resets at the start of each month.

import.dropOrBrowse: Drop a file here or click to browse

documents.noDocumentsDesc: Upload project documents to keep everything organized.

collaboration.title: Collaboration Projects
collaboration.noProjectsDesc: Create a collaboration project to manage multi-partner work.
collaboration.deviationThresholdsDesc: Warn when reported costs exceed budget by this percentage
collaboration.invitedToJoin: You have been invited to join
collaboration.invitationNotFound: Invitation not found or has expired.
collaboration.signInToAccess: Sign in to access the project dashboard
collaboration.toLinkProject: to link this project to your account
collaboration.confirmLaunchProject: Launch this project? Status will change to Active.
collaboration.confirmDeleteProject: Delete this collaboration project? This cannot be undone.
collaboration.confirmGenerateReports: Generate reports for all partners in this period?
collaboration.confirmDeletePeriod: Delete reporting period "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
collaboration.confirmSubmitReport: Submit this report for review? You can still make changes if it is returned.
collaboration.allPartnersInvited: All partners with emails have already been invited or accepted.
collaboration.endMonthMustBeGte: End month must be ≥ start month
collaboration.addPeriodsDesc: Add periods to start tracking partner financial reports.
collaboration.addPartnersForBudget: Add partners to see budget overview
collaboration.addPartnersWpsForEffort: Add partners and work packages to see the effort overview
collaboration.reminderSettingsDesc: Configure automatic reminders for upcoming deadlines. Relevant users will receive email and in-app notifications.
collaboration.reportsTabDesc: Generate EC-compatible reports for your project. Select a reporting period and download professionally formatted PDFs.
collaboration.periodicTechnicalReportDesc: Comprehensive technical progress report covering objectives, work packages, deliverables, and milestones for the selected reporting period.
collaboration.financialStatementDesc: Financial overview per beneficiary with cost breakdowns by category, indirect costs, and total requested EU contribution.
collaboration.publishableSummaryDesc: High-level project overview suitable for publication — consortium, work plan, expected impact, and budget summary.
collaboration.selectPeriodFirst: Please select a reporting period first
collaboration.describeCorrections: Describe what needs to be corrected...
collaboration.reportReturnedForCorrections: Report returned to partner for corrections
collaboration.setStartDateForGantt: Set project start date and duration to see the Gantt chart.
collaboration.addWpsForGantt: Add work packages to see the Gantt chart.
collaboration.noAccountNeeded: You don't need an account to accept this invitation.
collaboration.youAreNowPartner: You are now a partner in this project.
collaboration.failedToAcceptInvitation: Failed to accept invitation. Please try again.
collaboration.noCollabProjectsFiltered: No collaboration projects match your filters.
collaboration.quickImportAiDesc: Upload a grant agreement PDF or budget table screenshot — AI will extract everything automatically
collaboration.setupNewDesc: Set up a multi-partner project with external reporting
collaboration.setupEditDesc: Edit all project details, partners, work plan, deliverables and milestones
collaboration.setupAiDesc: Upload your grant agreement PDF or a screenshot of the budget table. AI will extract project details, partners, work packages, tasks, deliverables, and milestones.
collaboration.setupAiDoc1Desc: contains budget table, work packages, deliverables
collaboration.setupAiHintsPlaceholder: Optional hints: e.g. 'Budget is in Annex 2, we are Partner 3'
collaboration.setupAiDropzone: Drop PDF or image here, or click to browse
collaboration.setupAiExtracted: Extracted: {{counts}}. Review all fields before creating.
collaboration.setupAiTryDifferent: Try a different file format or add specific instructions about where the data is located.
collaboration.setupSchemeTip: The specific action type or instrument under the funding programme. For Horizon Europe: RIA, IA, CSA, ERC grants, MSCA actions, EIC instruments, etc.
collaboration.setupConsortiumDesc: Add all organisations including the coordinator
collaboration.setupOrgTypeTip: Official EU participant type: HES = University, REC = Research Org, PRC = Private Company, PUB = Public Body, OTH = Other
collaboration.setupCountryTip: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code as used in Horizon Europe (e.g. DE, FR, IT, ES).
collaboration.setupWpAndTasksDesc: Define work packages, tasks, and allocate person-months per partner per task
collaboration.setupNoTasksYet: No tasks yet — click "Add Task" to break this WP into individual tasks
collaboration.setupDeliverablesDesc: Project outputs to be submitted at specific months
collaboration.setupMilestonesDesc: Key checkpoints to verify project progress
collaboration.setupVerificationPh: How to verify this milestone is reached
collaboration.setupDraftNotice: The project will be created in Draft status.
collaboration.setupDraftDesc: You can continue editing, add more details, and configure reporting periods. When ready, launch the project to send invitations to all partners.

landing.heroSub: Streamline your EU & public-funded project management with powerful tools for allocations, timesheets, financials, and reporting.
landing.trustedBy: Trusted by research organisations across Europe

subscription.currentPlanDesc: View and manage your GrantLume subscription.
subscription.trialDaysLeft: {{count}} day(s) remaining in your free trial
subscription.trialExpiredDesc: Your trial has ended. You are now on the Free plan with limited features. Upgrade to Pro to restore full access.
subscription.trialExpiringDesc: Your trial ends in {{count}} day(s). Upgrade to keep all your data and features.
subscription.manageSubscriptionDesc: Your subscription portal will be available once billing is connected.
subscription.upgradeComingSoonDesc: Automated billing is being set up. Please contact hello@grantlume.com to upgrade your plan.
subscription.paymentUnavailableDesc: The payment system is not loaded. Please refresh the page or try again later.
subscription.checkoutFailed: Could not open the checkout. Please try again.
subscription.faqUpgradeAnswer: Upgrades take effect immediately. You'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of your billing cycle.
subscription.faqDowngradeAnswer: Contact us at hello@grantlume.com to downgrade. Your current plan stays active until the end of the billing period.
subscription.faqCancelAnswer: You can cancel anytime. Your data remains accessible in read-only mode until the end of your billing period.
subscription.faqData: Is my data safe if my trial expires?
subscription.faqDataAnswer: Yes. Your data is preserved indefinitely on the Free plan. Upgrade anytime to regain full access.
subscription.paymentNote: Payments are processed securely by Stripe. For billing questions, contact

invite.secureAndPrivate: Your data is secure and private
invite.freeToJoin: Free to join — no payment required
invite.createToJoin: Set up your account to join {{org}}
invite.createToGetStarted: Set up your account to get started
invite.emailPreFilled: This email was set by the person who invited you.
invite.orgPreFilled: This was set by the coordinator who invited you.
invite.accountExistsDesc: An account with {{email}} already exists. Please sign in to accept the invitation.
invite.afterConfirmOrgDesc: After confirming your email, you'll automatically join {{org}}.
invite.afterConfirmCollabDesc: After confirming your email, you'll be connected to the {{project}} collaboration.
invite.collabInviteAcceptedDesc: You've been connected to the project. You can now submit reports and track your contributions.
invite.orgInviteAcceptedDesc: You've been added to the organisation. You can now access all features available to your role.
